name: Classic Green Bean Bake
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 oz Campbell's Cream of Mushroom Soup
2 Packages (9 oz. each) frozen cut green beans, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2-quart casserole, combine soup, milk, soy sauce, and pepper.
2. Add beans and 1/2 can of the onions.
3. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until hot and bubbling. Stir.
4. Top with remaining onions. Bake for 5 more minutes.
Makes 6 servings. Recipe may be doubled.
